specific_question: At what point did Elexion finish moving its dealer network to a cloud-based CRM system?
answer: Elexion Automotive finished moving its whole dealer network to a cloud-based CRM platform on March 22, 2024.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
